name: mcp-research-agent-eval-dataset
description: Evaluation dataset for MCP Research Agent

inputs.question: Research observability platforms for AI agents, analyze their features, and recommend the best approach

outputs.expected: Comprehensive research should cover multiple observability platforms (LangSmith, Phoenix, LangFuse), analyze features, provide comparative analysis, and give clear recommendations based on use case.

inputs.question: Provide strategic recommendations for implementing AI agents in enterprise

outputs.expected: Strategic recommendations should include comprehensive analysis, actionable insights on scalability and integration, training programs, and clear implementation roadmap with success metrics.

inputs.question: Analyze the adoption metrics for LangChain in production systems

outputs.expected: LangChain adoption shows strong growth with increasing enterprise usage, positive satisfaction metrics, and recommendations for scalability improvements and integration capabilities.

inputs.question: What are the latest trends in AI agent architectures?

outputs.expected: Recent trends in AI agent architectures include multi-agent systems, LangChain/LangGraph patterns, and modern orchestration frameworks with focus on production readiness and observability.
